data.title: This Bill Gates 'Mistake' Cost Microsoft A $400 Billion Opportunity, According To Android Co-Founder: 'Sorry, Bill'
data.description: Bill Gates admits mismanagement led to Microsoft missing out on the mobile sector. Android co-founder says Gates is more responsible than he realizes.

data.title: Trump Says Ukraine's Zelensky Is 'Not Ready For Peace' After Oval Office Spat: 'He Disrespected The United States Of America'
data.description: President Donald Trump voiced his discontent with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy following their meeting at the White House.

data.title: Trump To Host First-Ever White House Crypto Summit Next Friday: BTC Surges Past $85,000, DOGE Surges Over 10%
data.description: President Donald Trump is set to host the inaugural cryptocurrency summit at the White House next Friday. This event marks a significant step in his administration’s engagement with the crypto industry.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Loads Up On Tempus AI, Archer Aviation, But Sells Twist Bioscience: Here Are Key Ark Trades This Friday
data.description: Ark Invest made notable trades on Feb. 28, 2025. They purchased shares in ACHR, RXRX, TEM, and IRDM, while selling shares in TWST, ADYEY, ACCD, and EXAS.
